appraisal_events.evidence: « … parce qu'il avait la prétention d'être un esprit libre et moderne, et aussi pour n'avoir pas l'air de faire cas des relations royales, auxquelles il tenait beaucoup. »
appraisal_events.explanation: The narrator unveils the duke’s pose of wanting to appear modern while clinging to royal relations, which makes him pretentious and not very sincere.

status_effects.explanation: His image is diminished by the laying bare of his pretension and his society hypocrisy.
